RRMCompass AI Summary

Mixed risk signal

Open reserves, severity concentration, and worsening trend create underwriting pressure. The dashboard converts claims data into broker-ready operational intelligence.

Recommended Focus

  • Slip/fall prevention and floor inspection proof
  • Food-safety incident documentation
  • Open-claim reserve review cadence

RRMDefense Readiness

For each claim, RRM can compile training records, inspection logs, corrective actions, and incident timelines into an operational proof package.
